final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire enable,
    input wire set,
    input wire reset,
    output reg data
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (enable) begin
        if (set) begin
            data <= 1'b1; // Write logic '1'
        end else if (reset) begin
            data <= 1'b0; // Write logic '0'
        end
    end
end

endmodule
